# Groundwork

> An AI-native development foundation for Mac, Linux/WSL, and headless agent workspaces: tool setup plus the fundamentals that stay useful when tools change (shell, Git, project instructions, verification, and directing AI agents).

Groundwork scaffolds the developer: environment, fundamentals, and
agent-direction skills. Its sibling, Roost, scaffolds an
organization's code and process. Repo:
https://github.com/jasondockery/groundwork

## Docs

- [Vibe coding toward agentic engineering · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/agentic-engineering.html): This is the idea the docs hang on. Vibe coding gets people building quickly. Agentic engineering is the disciplined practice of directing agents while keeping…
- [AI agents &amp; project instructions · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/agents.html): The goal is boring in the best way: every coding assistant sees the same project expectations, and tool-specific files stay tiny. That keeps instructions easy…
- [Know your AI budget · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/ai-budget.html): Every AI tool runs inside limits: a context window, plan or rate limits, and sometimes a spend budget. This page teaches one durable habit — check your tool's…
- [Apps with AI · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/app-dev.html): An app is a site that remembers things. You'll build a small task tracker that saves your data, runs on a real database, and deploys to the cloud — and you'll…
- [Apps &amp; browsers · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/apps.html): Not everything happens in a terminal. On a Mac, Groundwork installs a small desktop layer around the agent workflow: the browser you inspect with, a launcher…
- [Cheat sheet · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/cheatsheet.html): Every shortcut and daily helper worth memorizing, pulled together for quick scanning or printing. Each section links to the page that teaches it in full.
- [Claude &amp; Claude Code · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/claude.html): Claude Code is Anthropic's coding agent for the terminal, editor, and desktop, and it is the default agent Groundwork installs. This page maps its surfaces…
- [Codex UI &amp; CLI · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/codex.html): Codex is OpenAI's coding agent across the terminal, desktop app, IDE, and hosted workflows. In Groundwork, it sits beside Claude Code as another capable agent…
- [Command line &amp; Unix · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/command-line.html): Once you can open a terminal and move around, this is the next layer: the core commands, how to chain them, how to write a small script, and — the part most…
- [Command catalog · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/commands.html): This is the "what command was that again?" page. The same catalog is available in the terminal with groundwork-help, so the help follows you even when the…
- [Customizing Groundwork · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/customizing.html): Groundwork is a shared base, not an all-or-nothing box. Keep your personal preferences in local files and machine-local chezmoi data so you can keep pulling…
- [Data &amp; storage · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/data.html): Strip any serious application down and you find the same thing: data, and rules about who can change it. The code around it comes and goes; the data model…
- [Dependencies · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/dependencies.html): Every real project sits on top of packages other people update weekly. Left alone, those updates pile up into risky, months-long upgrade projects. Handled…
- [Development learning paths · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/development.html): Use this as the curriculum layer on top of Groundwork. Learn enough fundamentals to think clearly, build small real projects, and use agents as tutors…
- [Editors &amp; AI · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/editors-ai.html): This setup has two families of tool: editors, where you type code yourself, and AI agents, which read your project and make changes for you. Knowing what each…
- [FPS in a week: Unity build · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/game-dev-unity.html): The industry route. You will build a real Call-of-Duty-flavored arena shooter in Unity 6: a polished environment, animated weapons, enemies with navigation…
- [FPS in a week: browser build · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/game-dev.html): Not a toy. A fast, good-looking arena shooter that runs in any browser: real movement and gunplay, enemies that flank and shoot back, a HUD with a radar and a…
- [Image &amp; video with AI: a week-long build · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/gen-media.html): Not a tour of art apps. A developer's week: you will treat image and video models as APIs and pipelines you build with, wire them into code, and ship a small…
- [Getting started · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/getting-started.html): Never used a command line? Start here. In fifteen minutes you'll know what a terminal is, how to read the prompt, what a command and a file path are, and how…
- [Git · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/git.html): Git records snapshots of your project over time. That means you can go back to any earlier version, try risky things without fear, and work alongside other…
- [GLM &amp; open models · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/glm.html): GLM is the leading open-weights model family for coding and agentic work, and it stands here for a whole category: models whose weights you can download, run…
- [Glossary · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/glossary.html): Every field has its own vocabulary, and the terminal has a lot of it. Here's what the words mean — short, concrete, and pointing you to the page that goes…
- [GPT &amp; ChatGPT · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/gpt.html): ChatGPT and GPT models are excellent for tutoring, brainstorming, explaining errors, writing specs, and exploring options. They are not a substitute for a…
- [Grok &amp; Grok Build · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/grok.html): Grok is SpaceXAI's assistant, and Grok Build is its terminal coding agent, powered by Grok 4.5 — a model pitched directly at frontier coding work. Groundwork…
- [Groundwork Twelve · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/groundwork-twelve.html): Twelve stages from zero to AI-native development habits: terminal, tmux, Git, an editor, real programming, data, the web, and directing agents. Run it steady…
- [Overview · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/): You can build real software with AI today, before you know a single keyboard shortcut. That's the on-ramp. Groundwork is written for adult learners: start…
- [What's installed · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/installed.html): The setup asks a small set of install-time questions — work machine, whether a Mac is a server/CI machine, password manager, and identity — and those answers…
- [Keyboard · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/keyboard.html): The most useful key on the keyboard was wasted on Caps Lock. This setup turns it into the two keys you press most in a terminal — Escape and Control — so the…
- [Knowledge base · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/knowledge.html): Most people re-read their own notes every time they have a question. A better pattern: feed your sources to an AI agent once, have it build a structured wiki…
- [macOS desktop shortcuts · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/macos.html): tmux manages panes inside the terminal. macOS manages everything around it: app windows, browser tabs, full-screen spaces, displays, and the links you open…
- [Neovim · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/neovim.html): Neovim is a keyboard-first editor that lives in the terminal. It is optional, not a purity test, but it pairs beautifully with an agent workflow because…
- [Starting a project · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/new-project.html): A new project is more than an empty folder. A minute of setup gives every AI agent the project's conventions, pins the right tool versions, and starts its Git…
- [The path · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/path.html): The path is the journey; the reference pages are the library. Start by building something small with an agent. Then learn each foundation or tool when a real…
- [Platforms · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/platforms.html): Groundwork is organized around the learning path, not the operating system. The platform only decides which parts of the environment get installed: the shared…
- [Practice plan · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/practice.html): Keyboard skill is built by short, repeated reps. This page gives beginners a path and gives experienced developers a way to rebuild muscle memory without…
- [Resource library · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/resources.html): Start with the free fundamentals, add the AI-native workflow docs, then keep the official references nearby. The point is not to collect links; it is to build…
- [Setup &amp; chezmoi · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/setup.html): chezmoi keeps the configuration for your environment in one Git repository, and lays those files down in the right places on each supported profile: full Mac…
- [Shell &amp; modern CLI · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/shell.html): The classic Unix commands have faster, friendlier rewrites. This setup installs them and points the familiar names straight at them, because these are the…
- [tmux · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/tmux.html): tmux splits a single terminal window into panes and tabs, keeps work running after you close the window, and gives agents a visible workspace beside your…
- [Troubleshooting · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/troubleshooting.html): Most "it's broken" moments after a fresh install are one of a dozen known things — a permission macOS won't let a script grant, a step that needs a restart, a…
- [Web and sites with AI · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/web-dev.html): You'll go from a blank file to a real, live website anyone can visit — starting with a single page you fully understand, then layering on style…
- [Why Groundwork · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/why.html): Groundwork exists because AI makes it easier to produce code before you understand the system around it. The answer is not to slow people down. It is to give…
- [Everyday workflow · Groundwork](https://jasondockery.github.io/groundwork/workflow.html): You've met the tools one at a time. This is the part that turns them into an AI-native way of working — one terminal window where the editor, the shell, Git…
